exercises.audioScript: You should listen to your parents.
exercises.hindiScript: तुम्हें अपने माता-पिता की सुनना चाहिए।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: You should listen to your parents.
exercises.answer: You should listen to your parents.

exercises.audioScript: We should take care of the environment.
exercises.hindiScript: हमें environment का ध्यान रखना चाहिए।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: We should take care of the environment.
exercises.answer: We should take care of the environment.

exercises.audioScript: She should not miss this opportunity.
exercises.hindiScript: उसे यह मौका नहीं छोड़ना चाहिए।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: You should not get angry too much.
She should not miss this opportunity.
exercises.answer: She should not miss this opportunity.

dictationPassage.text: He should tell the truth. We should follow the rules. You should practice more. Should we buy this? He should not smoke.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: उसे सच बताना चाहिए। हमें नियम मानने चाहिए। तुम्हें ज्यादा practice करनी चाहिए। क्या हमें यह खरीदना चाहिए? उसे धूम्रपान नहीं करना चाहिए।
